projects.summary_zh: 大型网络安全知识库 | 结构化技能格式 | 多框架合规
projects.summary_en: Large cybersecurity knowledge base | Structured skill format | Multi-framework compliant
projects.recommendation_zh: AI安全助手技能扩展首选，渗透测试与威胁狩猎场景优先采用
projects.recommendation_en: Best for extending AI agent security capabilities, priority for pentest and threat hunting
highlights_zh: 754个结构化网络安全技能，覆盖26个安全领域
唯一同时映射MITRE ATT&CK、NIST CSF 2.0、ATLAS、D3FEND、NIST AI RMF五大框架的开源库
CI/CD自动化验证YAML frontmatter和命名规范，质量控制完善
支持26+AI平台，agentskills.io标准确保互操作性
highlights_en: 754 structured cybersecurity skills across 26 security domains
Only open-source library mapping to all 5 frameworks: ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, ATLAS, D3FEND, AI RMF
CI/CD automated validation for YAML frontmatter and naming conventions
Supports 26+ AI platforms with agentskills.io standard interoperability
concerns_zh: 仅4位贡献者维护754个技能，长期可持续性存潜在风险
项目本质是知识库而非传统软件，缺少单元测试和集成测试覆盖
内容更新依赖社区贡献，版本控制策略不明确
concerns_en: Only 4 contributors maintaining 754 skills, potential sustainability risk
Knowledge base not traditional software, lacks unit/integration test coverage
Content updates depend on community, version control strategy unclear
